hero_headline: A MaRe Head Spa experience, designed for The Lux Atelier.
hero_subhead: Your Upper East Side clientele already expects protocol-led precision — MaRe is the next standard they will come to expect.
why_you_bullets: At $2M–$5M annual revenue across three locations, The Lux Atelier operates at exactly the scale where MaRe's retail conversion protocol delivers compounding returns.
Your modern-minimal aesthetic and award-winning reputation attract the same discerning client MaRe was built for — one who values science-supported results over trend-chasing.
A New York Magazine flagship with multi-location infrastructure means MaRe Eye's trichologist-developed diagnostics can be deployed at scale, with consistency across every touchpoint.
roi_copy: At ~85 clients/week, MaRe Eye moves The Lux Atelier from ~3% retail conversion to 40%+. Projected additional annual revenue: $398,000.

hero_headline: A MaRe Head Spa experience, designed for Sola Wellness Studio.
hero_subhead: Your Palm Beach expansion confirms what MaRe has always known — clean, biodynamic protocols belong at the center of the scalp wellness conversation.
why_you_bullets: With two locations and a dedicated scalp wellness floor, Sola Wellness has built the infrastructure where MaRe's full protocol system can be implemented without compromise.
Your organic-wellness aesthetic and biodynamic philosophy align precisely with Philip Martin's Italian formulations — products rooted in the same clean-science principles your clients seek.
Positioned across two HNW South Florida markets, a MaRe partnership places you at the leading edge of a scalp care category growing at 7% CAGR globally.
roi_copy: At ~40 clients/week, MaRe Eye moves Sola Wellness Studio from ~3% retail conversion to 40%+. Projected additional annual revenue: $187,000.

hero_headline: A MaRe Head Spa experience, designed for Rosewood Spa Aspen.
hero_subhead: Forbes Five-Star guests at Rosewood Aspen arrive expecting the exceptional — MaRe delivers the world's first unified scalp wellness system to match that standard.
why_you_bullets: Rosewood's Forbes Five-Star certification and $5M+ revenue tier places this partnership in MaRe's most exclusive partner category — reserved for venues where protocol fidelity is non-negotiable.
An ultra-high-net-worth clientele that travels globally for curated wellness experiences is precisely the audience MaRe Eye was developed to serve: personalised, trichologist-validated, data-driven.
Across 12 Rosewood properties, a MaRe partnership represents one of the most scalable deployments of the MaRe Capsule and Eye system in the luxury hospitality category.
roi_copy: At ~140 clients/week, MaRe Eye moves Rosewood Spa Aspen from ~3% retail conversion to 40%+. Projected additional annual revenue: $655,000.
